Show HN: A tiny library for parsing dates

By alice

I'd recommend starting with the official Rust Book — it's surprisingly easy to follow if you've used C++ or Go before.

By bob

Building a small project end to end teaches more than reading. Pick a parser or a CLI and ship it.

By carol

Don't skip the chapter on lifetimes; it's the part that gives most newcomers the biggest leverage later.

By dan

Reading other people's open-source crates is what bridged the gap for me from beginner to comfortable.
